sourceSections: Adding Files to Your Knowledge Base
Impact of Knowledge Base on AI Responses

sections.lead: Users can access the projects tab on the left to view existing projects or create new ones by assigning a title and optional description.

bullets.label: Access Projects
bullets.text: The projects tab is located on the left side of the screen where existing projects will be visible.

bullets.label: New Project
bullets.text: New users can create a new project by clicking "new project" and assigning a title.

bullets.label: Optional Description
bullets.text: An optional description can be added when creating a new project.

sections.lead: Inside a project, three key components—project memory, instructions, and files—define how the AI interacts and generates responses.

bullets.label: Key Components
bullets.text: Once inside a selected project, users will see three key components.

bullets.label: Project Memory
bullets.text: One key component is project memory, which defines AI interaction.

bullets.label: Instructions
bullets.text: Instructions are another component that defines how the AI will generate responses.

bullets.label: Files Knowledge Base
bullets.text: Files, also referred to as the knowledge base, form the third key component.

bullets.label: Define AI Interaction
bullets.text: These elements collectively define how the AI will interact and generate responses within that specific project.

sections.lead: Files are easily added to your project's knowledge base by clicking the plus icon and selecting upload options from your device.

bullets.label: Add Files
bullets.text: To enrich your project's knowledge, files can be easily added to the knowledge base.

bullets.label: Plus Icon
bullets.text: This is done by clicking the plus icon.

bullets.label: Upload Options
bullets.text: Users select "upload from device" or other relevant upload options.

bullets.label: Accessible Knowledge
bullets.text: The uploaded files will then become part of the project's accessible knowledge.

sections.lead: After a file upload, AI chat will reference its information, generating informed and contextually relevant responses using documents like scientific journals.

bullets.label: AI Referencing
bullets.text: After a file is uploaded, any subsequent AI chat within that project will begin referencing the information contained in the new file.

bullets.label: Informed Responses
bullets.text: The AI will use the document's content to generate more informed responses.

bullets.label: Relevant Context
bullets.text: Responses will be more contextually relevant, leveraging the added knowledge.

bullets.label: Content Examples
bullets.text: The AI can use content such as scientific journals or specific data.

sections.lead: Combining the knowledge base with project-specific instructions achieves consistent response types and styles across different chats.

bullets.label: Combine Resources
bullets.text: The video highlights the utility of combining the knowledge base with project-specific instructions.

bullets.label: Consistent Responses
bullets.text: Users can consistently achieve similar types or styles of responses across different chats.

bullets.label: Uniformity
bullets.text: This ensures uniformity and predictability in the AI's output.

bullets.label: Alignment
bullets.text: The AI's output is aligned with predefined guidelines and loaded knowledge.

sections.lead: Adding a knowledge base tailors AI interactions by guiding the AI with specific documents and instructions for consistent, relevant, context-aware responses.

bullets.label: Tailor AI
bullets.text: Adding a knowledge base to your cloud projects is a powerful way to tailor AI interactions.

bullets.label: Guide AI
bullets.text: By providing specific documents and instructions, you can guide the AI.

bullets.label: Consistent Responses
bullets.text: The AI will produce consistent responses.

bullets.label: Relevant Responses
bullets.text: The AI will produce relevant responses.

bullets.label: Context-Aware
bullets.text: The AI will produce context-aware responses.

bullets.label: Enhance Utility
bullets.text: This significantly enhances the utility of your projects.
